scripts.build:cf: npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/middleware .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/.build .open-next/assets/ && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js
scripts.preview: npm run build:cf && wrangler pages dev .open-next/assets
